signals.raw: **Oct 29, 2025: Powell notes expectation of additional modest inflation (0.2-0.4%) from ongoing tariffs into spring 2026, but views as one-time price level shift, not persistent; follows second straight rate cut to 3.75-4%.** Non-tariff inflation near 2%.[3]
